name: Liu Kuo

sections.short-biography: Was said to have bought a young Liu Shan with money.

sections.biography-source-undefined:
In 211–212, he fled the chaos in the Guanzhong region and escaped into Hanzhong. He then bought Liu Shan from some people, learning that he was a son from a noble family. Liu Kuo adopted him as his son and managed to find someone for Liu Shan to marry.

His historical existence is doubted as it comes from a bogus anecdote about Liu Shan.

full_text:
Liu Kuo 劉括
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Kuo (劉括)was born in Fufeng commandery. Was said to have bought a young Liu Shan with money. Liu Kuo may not have existed in history.

BiographySource Undefined
In 211–212, he fled the chaos in the Guanzhong region and escaped into Hanzhong. He then bought Liu Shan from some people, learning that he was a son from a noble family. Liu Kuo adopted him as his son and managed to find someone for Liu Shan to marry.
His historical existence is doubted as it comes from a bogus anecdote about Liu Shan.
